PowerShell($edge = "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"; $out = "C:\\Users\\258051~1\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\c--Work-gitHub-tbi\\d7a7693f-0739-4452-9010-290a14df73b3\\scratchpad"; & $edge --headless=new --disable-gpu --window-size=1440,5200 --hide-scrollbars --virtual-time-budget=12000 --screenshot="$out\\w1-services.png" http://localhost:3126/services; Start-Sleep 2; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $src = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("$out\\w1-services.png"\); $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\(1440,900\); $g=[System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.DrawImage\($src, \(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0,0,1440,900\)\), \(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0,3280,1440,900\)\), [System.Drawing.GraphicsUnit]::Pixel\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Save\("$out\\w1-marketing.png",[System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); $src.Dispose\(\); echo done)

PowerShell($out = "C:\\Users\\258051~1\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\c--Work-gitHub-tbi\\d7a7693f-0739-4452-9010-290a14df73b3\\scratchpad"; Start-Sleep 4; if \(Test-Path "$out\\w1-services.png"\) { Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $src = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("$out\\w1-services.png"\); $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\(1440,900\); $g=[System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.DrawImage\($src, \(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0,0,1440,900\)\), \(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0,3280,1440,900\)\), [System.Drawing.GraphicsUnit]::Pixel\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Save\("$out\\w1-marketing.png",[System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); $src.Dispose\(\); echo cropped } else { echo "still missing" })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; foreach \($i in 1..7\) { $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("c:\\Work\\gitHub\\tbi\\the-brilliant-ideas\\public\\image-story\\new$i.png"\); $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($img\); $w=$bmp.Width; $h=$bmp.Height; $a1=$bmp.GetPixel\(10,10\).A; $a2=$bmp.GetPixel\([int]\($w/2\),10\).A; $c=$bmp.GetPixel\(12,[int]\($h/2\)\); Write-Host "new$i \(${w}x${h}\): corner-A=$a1 top-A=$a2 edge=#$\('{0:X2}{1:X2}{2:X2}' -f $c.R,$c.G,$c.B\)"; $bmp.Dispose\(\); $img.Dispose\(\) })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; foreach \($t in @\(@\(1,90,400\),@\(1,512,760\),@\(2,100,500\),@\(2,512,600\),@\(6,300,150\),@\(6,760,500\),@\(7,200,600\),@\(7,512,700\)\)\) { $i=$t[0]; $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("c:\\Work\\gitHub\\tbi\\the-brilliant-ideas\\public\\image-story\\new$i.png"\); $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($img\); $p=$bmp.GetPixel\($t[1],$t[2]\); Write-Host "new$i \($\($t[1]\),$\($t[2]\)\): A=$\($p.A\) #$\('{0:X2}{1:X2}{2:X2}' -f $p.R,$p.G,$p.B\)"; $bmp.Dispose\(\); $img.Dispose\(\) })

PowerShell($edge = "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"; $out = "C:\\Users\\258051~1\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\c--Work-gitHub-tbi\\d7a7693f-0739-4452-9010-290a14df73b3\\scratchpad"; & $edge --headless=new --disable-gpu --window-size=1440,6400 --hide-scrollbars --virtual-time-budget=12000 --screenshot="$out\\sky-home.png" http://localhost:3129/; Start-Sleep 3; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $src = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("$out\\sky-home.png"\); $h=$src.Height; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\(1440,500\); $g=[System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.DrawImage\($src, \(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0,0,1440,500\)\), \(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0,\($h-1100\),1440,500\)\), [System.Drawing.GraphicsUnit]::Pixel\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Save\("$out\\sky-crop.png",[System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); $src.Dispose\(\); echo cropped)

PowerShell($out = "C:\\Users\\258051~1\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\c--Work-gitHub-tbi\\d7a7693f-0739-4452-9010-290a14df73b3\\scratchpad"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $src = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("$out\\sky-home.png"\); $h=$src.Height; Write-Host "page height: $h"; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\(1440,420\); $g=[System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.DrawImage\($src, \(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0,0,1440,420\)\), \(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0,\($h-820\),1440,420\)\), [System.Drawing.GraphicsUnit]::Pixel\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Save\("$out\\sky-crop2.png",[System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); $src.Dispose\(\); echo cropped)

PowerShell($out = "C:\\Users\\258051~1\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\c--Work-gitHub-tbi\\d7a7693f-0739-4452-9010-290a14df73b3\\scratchpad"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $src = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\("$out\\sky-home.png"\); $dark1=-1; $dark2=-1; for \($y=0; $y -lt $src.Height; $y+=10\) { $p=$src.GetPixel\(720,$y\); if \($p.R -lt 60 -and $p.B -lt 80\) { if \($dark1 -lt 0\) { $dark1=$y }; $dark2=$y } }; Write-Host "dark footer spans y $dark1 to $dark2"; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\(1440,400\); $g=[System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.DrawImage\($src, \(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0,0,1440,400\)\), \(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle\(0,\($dark1-250\),1440,400\)\), [System.Drawing.GraphicsUnit]::Pixel\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Save\("$out\\sky-crop3.png",[System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); $src.Dispose\(\); echo cropped)
